title: Part 1
content: Step one was to save the current theme in local storage, this way whenever the user refreshes the page, the theme stays the same.
Next I created a function that checks if there is a saved theme and loads it. If nothing is saved, it will by default load as dark mode.
(I know you wanted light mode but dark mode looks better).
Lastly, if the button is pressed, the theme will check the current theme, and swap to the other theme, finally saving it by calling the first function.
